overall.description: First-person gameplay footage walking along a forest trail at night. A brown horse emerges from the trees on the left, crosses the path in front of the player, and continues down the trail into the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow forest trail between rock face and pine trees

events.description: brown horse becomes visible standing among trees on the left side of the path ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the narrow dirt trail through the dark forest

notable_agents.action: brown horse standing still among the trees on the left side of the trail

entered.detail: tall pine trees lining the left side of the forest trail
steep rock cliff face rising on the right side of the path
narrow winding dirt trail through the forest

segments.scene_description: Walking along a narrow forest trail at night, flanked by tall pine trees on the left and a rock cliff on the right. The path is surrounded by dense underbrush. A brown horse becomes visible standing among the trees ahead on the left side of the trail.

events.description: horse begins walking across the path from left to right toward the camera
horse passes directly in front of camera, temporarily blocking left portion of view

agents.ego_description: continuing forward as the horse approaches and crosses the path

notable_agents.action: brown horse walking from left to right across the path, passing within arm's reach of the camera

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches the horse as it begins moving across the trail. The trees and cliff draw closer as the camera advances. The horse passes within arm's reach, temporarily blocking the left side of the frame before continuing across the path.

agents.ego_description: continuing down the trail as the horse moves away into the distance

notable_agents.action: horse walking away down the trail, gradually receding into the dark distance

segments.scene_description: Having passed the horse, the camera continues along the trail with the rock cliff now very close on the right side. The horse walks away down the path ahead, becoming smaller in the distance. The pine trees have been passed and now appear only as dark shapes in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective along a narrow forest trail at night as a brown horse crosses the path and recedes into the distance. It begins with the camera advancing between tall pine trees and a rock cliff, where the horse first appears standing among the foliage on the left. As the camera draws closer, the horse steps across the trail and passes within arm's reach, momentarily obscuring the view before clearing the path. The scene then shifts as the camera continues forward, pressing closer to the rock cliff on the right while the horse walks away down the trail. Finally, the horse becomes a small figure in the distance as the dense pine trees fade into dark shapes in the background.
